title: Extracting and setting point coordinates
description:
Extracting and setting point coordinates

Extracting and setting point coordinates

Use the CX, CY, CZ, CU, CV, CW, CS, and CT commands to get a coordinate of a point and set it.

xcoord = CX(P1)

P2 = XY(xcoord, 200, -20, 0)

ycoord = CY(P*) ' Gets current Y coordinate

CX(pick) = 25.5

CY(pick) = CY(pick) + 2.3
examples:
xcoord = CX(P1)
P2 = XY(xcoord, 200, -20, 0)
ycoord = CY(P*) ' Gets current Y coordinate

CX(pick) = 25.5
CY(pick) = CY(pick) + 2.3
